MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rita Howell.
Ann strayer, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: H. Kenntth Ahn, was sworn and direct esamined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Hyun Soo Kim.
EXH. 1 - Copy of Arbritration Award-------------------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 2 - Billing Statements-------------------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 3 - Judgment in case #01-AS07795------------------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 4 - Declaration-------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Hyun Soo Kim as follows:
Principal $45,640.45
Attorney's Fees $5,000.00
Costs $342.50, for a Total of $50,982.95
Counsel to prepare Judgment.
